message:
test: add 41 proptest property tests for connector_credential_broker

Comprehensive proptest coverage for the security-critical credential
broker module: scope subset logic, sensitivity ordering, provider
registration, credential lifecycle, lease issuance/revocation/expiry,
access rule enforcement, rotation, telemetry accuracy, audit log
bounds, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
